creator: kwm@rainbow-runner.nl
text:
Please note that the portrevision bump in gstreamer-plugins and 
gstreamer1-plugins is wrong, like the text above them explains. The 
slave ports that deal with the x264 plugins should be bumped instead. So 
the portrevision in multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-x264 and 
multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-x264 should be bumped.

-Koop
